frontier: Improve the direction review surface, the highest-stakes decision point in the loop
goal: Make the direction review moment legible and deliberate by showing what documents will change and providing clear context before approval

tasks.description: Restructure DirectionView with clear document preview headers and rationale organization
tasks.instructions:
Rewrite src/modules/main-panel/direction.view.tsx to:

1. Create a header section showing 'Direction Proposal' title, a brief description of what the user is approving, and a visual indicator of included documents.
2. Reorganize content into a labeled rationale section and a document previews section (each doc name with a badge, a 5-7 line read-only preview, and a 'view full document' link).
3. Use semantic colors (--foreground, --foreground-muted, --surface-raised, --border, --code-bg).
4. Keep all existing logic (approveDirection, discardDirection, acting, error states) and the Approve/Discard buttons.

tasks.description: Extract a reusable DocumentPreview component for displaying document snippets with view-full links
tasks.instructions: Create src/components/document-preview.tsx accepting name (string), preview (string), and optional fullContent. Render a labeled header (name in --foreground, 'Preview' in --foreground-faint), a --code-bg monospace preview area with --code-border, and a truncation indicator. Display-only; interactivity wired by the parent.

tasks.description: Integrate DocumentPreview component into DirectionView and wire document sidebar navigation
tasks.instructions: Update src/modules/main-panel/direction.view.tsx to import DocumentPreview, extract 5-7 line preview snippets from direction.docs, render a DocumentPreview per doc, and wire 'view full document' to call selectView({ kind: 'doc', name: doc.name }) via useMagent(). Always show direction.md and conventions.md; list additional docs below. Keep error handling and action states as-is.
